region_name: Devon and Torbay Combined County Authority
strap: Devon and Torbay Photonics draws £117m of UKRI lead-led funding across 74 grants, anchored by Exeter (41%), with Bay Photonics and Plessey Semiconductors on the industrial side. 4 Companies House-traced spin-outs translate to £29m UKRI per spin-out.
behaviour: The cluster shows low-confidence "Stabilising around incumbents" behaviour — research narrative is reinforced by recurring programme launches rather than narrowing toward commercial scaling, with academic capacity reabsorbing the cluster's signal.
